scripts.build: babel js --out-dir js_dist --extensions ".jsx,.js" --copy-files && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); let h=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); h=h.replace(/\.jsx/g, '.js').replace(/type=\"text\/babel\"/g, '').replace(/<script src=\"https:\/\/cdnjs\.cloudflare\.com\/ajax\/libs\/babel-standalone[^"]+\"><\/script>/g, ''); fs.writeFileSync('index.html', h);"
